actions_required.action: Update docs/P5_TASK4_PRODUCTION_CONFIG_FEASIBILITY.md — mark Task 4.3 COMPLETE. Update Task 4.5 scope per DEC-04 in the execution report.

Resolve DEC-01 (global NAT=3 vs adaptive), DEC-02 (AR collapse policy at 16K+), and DEC-03 (max context window lock). These three decisions unblock ADR-012 §2.2 finalization and are prerequisites for Task 5.
Update ADR-012 §2.2 num_assistant_tokens row from PROVISIONAL_BEST to LOCKED with the chosen strategy once DEC-01 is resolved.

Generate the execution prompt for Task 4.3b (Dynamic Sparse Attention A/B Test). It is pre-scoped in §7 of P5_TASK4_PRODUCTION_CONFIG_FEASIBILITY.md and is the next ready task. Key constraint: NEVER enable sparse attention on PA.
